title: LRC - JUIT
content: Library Statistics LRC consistently keeps track  of library usage, which aids in monitoring the library’s utilization. This  practice not only assists in delivering quality services to library users but  also plays a pivotal role in planning and implementing various measures and  provisions to create a conducive study environment. Some of the statistics are  being highlighted as: Circulation Related  Statistics Books Issued Books Returned E-Resources Usage Statistics Logins to OPAC E-Resource downloads Acquisition Related  Statistics Books added in the library collection Book Collections (Department-wise) Book Collection (Broad Groups) Periodicals Related  Statistics Periodicals in the Library General Statistics LRC usage (Overall) LRC visits (Footfall) Five days of high usage in 2021-22 Five days of high usage in 2022-23 Five days of high usage in 2023-24 Yearly Five days of high usage Related Links e-Books@UGC Portal AICTE e-Kumbh Portal Abhilekh Patal Web Portal WebOPAC (KOHA) Digital Library (Institutional Repository) Library Guidelines for Submitting Theses & Project Reports JUIT Publications Information Search Request Form E-Resources (On Campus) E-Resources (Off Campus) Research Articles Request Form Print Journals New Arrivals Hilly Ramblings You Said it We Did it NPTEL (Home Page) NPTEL (Campus Access) NDL Shodhganga Delnet
